name: Tourtiere (Canadian Pork Pie)
recipeInstructions:
PASTRY
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour and salt. Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut in the margarine until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
2. Add yogurt and mix thoroughly. Form the dough into 2 equal balls. Wrap each ball in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
FILLING
1. In a small nonstick skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring frequently, until onion is golden.
2. Transfer to a large bowl and add the remaining filling ingredients; stir to combine.
PREPARE PIE
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Roll each ball of dough between two sheets of wax paper, forming two 9-inch circles. Fit one circle into an 8-inch pie pan and add the filling.
3. Place the second circle over the filling and fold the edges under. If desired, flute the edges.
4. Gently pierce the dough to allow steam to escape. Brush the pastry with beaten egg.
5. Bake until the top crust is golden brown, 25 to 30 minutes.
